title: The Patron Saint of Murderers - Ada Palmer
summary: Dwarkesh Patel interviews Ada Palmer on his YouTube podcast. The episode explores philosophical and historical themes related to morality and social systems through Palmer's intellectual lens.
writeup: Dwarkesh Patel interviews historian and author Ada Palmer in an episode titled "The Patron Saint of Murderers," a discussion-format conversation exploring Palmer's ideas and work.
